name: Layers
summary: The Layers class is a container class for all layers in a Document.

methods.summary: The #[] method returns a value from the array of Layout::Layers.
methods.remarks: The #[] method returns a value from the array of Layout::Layers.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index of the Layout::Layer to return.

throws.when: if index is out of range

methods.name: add
methods.signature: add(shared = false) => Layout::Layer | add(name, shared = false) => Layout::Layer
methods.summary: The #add method adds a new Layout::Layer to the Document.
methods.remarks: The #add method adds a new Layout::Layer to the Document. The newly added Layout::Layer will be the last one in the Document.

params.name: shared
params.doc: true to make the Layout::Layer shared, false for non-shared.

methods.name: each
methods.summary: Note: Don't remove content from this collection while iterating over it with #each.
methods.remarks: Note: Don't remove content from this collection while iterating over it with #each. This would change the size of the collection and cause elements to be skipped as the indices change. Instead copy the current collection to an array using to_a and then use each on the array, when removing content. The #each method iterates through all of the Layout::Layers.

methods.name: index
methods.summary: The #index method returns the index of the Layout::Layer, or nil if it doesn't exist in the Document.
methods.remarks: The #index method returns the index of the Layout::Layer, or nil if it doesn't exist in the Document.

methods.name: length
methods.signature: length => Integer Also known as: size
methods.summary: The #length method returns the number of Layout::Layers.
methods.remarks: The #length method returns the number of Layout::Layers.

methods.name: remove
methods.signature: remove(layer, delete_entities = false) => Object | remove(index, delete_entities = false) => Object
methods.summary: The #remove method deletes the given Layout::Layer from the Document.
methods.remarks: The #remove method deletes the given Layout::Layer from the Document.

params.name: delete_entities
params.doc: Whether the Entitys on the deleted Layout::Layer should be deleted as well

throws.when: if the Layout::Layer is not in the Document
if the Layout::Layer is the only one in the Document

methods.name: reorder
methods.signature: reorder(layer, new_index) => Object | reorder(index, new_index) => Object
methods.summary: The #reorder method moves a Layout::Layer to a different index within the Document's list of layers.
methods.remarks: The #reorder method moves a Layout::Layer to a different index within the Document's list of layers. This will move the Layout::Layer such that its new index becomes new_index.

params.name: new_index
params.doc: The index to put the Layout::Layer at

throws.when: if the Layout::Layer is not in the Document
if new_index is out of range

properties.name: active
properties.summary: The #active method returns the active Layout::Layer in the Document.
properties.remarks: The #active method returns the active Layout::Layer in the Document.
